hero.subtitle: A premium, role-based platform for industrial safety. Streamline reporting, verification, and resolution of site hazards with real-time tracking and full accountability.

features.heading: Built for Industrial Excellence
features.subheading: Everything you need to manage site safety in one centralized platform.

roleWorkflow.title: Role-Based Workflow
roleWorkflow.desc: Customized access and dashboards for Flaggers, Verifiers, Resolvers, and Admins.

realtime.title: Real-Time Incident Tracking
realtime.desc: Monitor safety incidents and hazards as they happen with instant status updates.

mapReporting.title: Map-Based Hazard Reporting
mapReporting.desc: Pinpoint exact hazard locations on interactive maps for rapid on-ground response.

auditLogs.title: Audit Logs & Accountability
auditLogs.desc: Full history of actions taken on every incident, ensuring complete accountability.

controlPanel.title: Admin Control Panel
controlPanel.desc: Centralized management of users, site security logs, and system-wide configurations.

howItWorks.heading: How SiteSecure Works
howItWorks.subheading: Our structured workflow ensures every incident is handled with precision.

report.title: Report Incident
report.desc: Workers report hazards with photos and GPS location.

verify.title: Verify
verify.desc: Online and ground teams verify the reported incident.

resolve.title: Resolve
resolve.desc: Assigned resolvers fix the hazard and submit proof.

close.title: Close
close.desc: Admins review the resolution and formally close the case.

cta.heading: Ready to Secure Your Site?
cta.subheading: Join the network of professional safety teams using SiteSecure to eliminate hazards and optimize site reliability.

footer.copyright: SiteSecure. Site Reliability and Safety Management System.
